title: Partner outreach + candidate dataset shortlist
context: Elyos counts outcomes as adoptions, not merges, so the project needs a realistic adoption path early. Binding guardrail: open-access / aggregate / de-identified data only; controlled-access and identifiable data are EXCLUDED at gate-002; provenance on every assertion; the deliverable is documentation about the data, never the data itself. This task opens partner-outreach threads and produces a candidate dataset shortlist drawn only from open-access sources.
objective: Open at least one partner-outreach thread and produce a candidate open-access dataset shortlist with realistic adoption paths.
acceptanceCriteria: At least one partner-outreach thread opened (commons/repo/advocacy maintainer) with the contact and ask recorded.
Candidate dataset shortlist limited to open-access/aggregate sources, each annotated with a realistic adoption path (informal channel or self-serve PR/Zenodo fallback).
verifiedNeed stays false until a partner confirms adoption; no dataset is treated as approved without its own gate-002 artifact.
